description: Represents a field within a table, query, input/output, etc.

element.description: Protoform field element for runtime UI configuration.

fields.description: Nested fields, if the field is a complex type (i.e. the type represents an object or map type).

nullable.description: Indicates if the field allows null values (i.e. is not required).

repeated.description: Indicates if the field contains repeated values (i.e. an array of the given type).

title: Field
